messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0056",
  "title": "游戏内容与系统",
  "page_index": 24,
  "page_range": "24"
}

Section text:

message.content: This section consists solely of the heading "游戏内容与系统" (Game Content and Systems) on page 24. It functions as a structural marker and can only answer navigational questions regarding the document's organization, specifically identifying the location and title of the section dedicated to game mechanics and system architecture. It contains no substantive content, and therefore provides no specific entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. Any detailed information addressing these categories would be located in the subsequent subsections under this heading.
